top_findings.name: Hritikd/hermes
top_findings.description: Test-time compute scaling engine with Process Reward Models, MCTS, and beam search — o1-style reasoning infrastructure

top_findings.name: dayuwang401/spectral-orthogonal-exploration
top_findings.description: Official code for "Student Guides Teacher: Weak-to-Strong Inference via Spectral Orthogonal Exploration" (SOE, ACL 2026 Oral). A training-free, test-time scaling method that fixes reasoning collapse in LLM mathematical reasoning via orthogonal probing.

top_findings.name: dinho-afsn/agentic-harness-patterns-skill
top_findings.description: Build production patterns for AI coding agents from Claude Code source analysis and harness engineering practice.

top_findings.name: zizhao-hu/llm-alignment-compute-scaling
top_findings.description: Audit how safety alignment degrades as a function of test-time compute budget — best-of-N sampling, extended CoT, and verifier-guided search.

top_findings.name: dhanushcodie/AgentTwo
top_findings.description: Multi-agent technical architecture pipeline — turns an AgentOne requirements plan into an in-depth, cost-weighed technical implementation and release plan (Claude Code plugin)

top_findings.name: IINemo/thinkbooster
top_findings.description: Open-source framework for test-time compute scaling of LLMs. Includes a visual debugger for inspecting reasoning traces and an endpoint that provides OpenAI-compatible API.

top_findings.name: pr0mila/Frontier-AI-Concepts
top_findings.description: A technical reading guide on Mechanistic Interpretability, Test-Time Compute Scaling, and Native Multimodal Pretraining. Built for ML practitioners, not beginners.

top_findings.name: jrajath94/stair-tts-scaling-laws
top_findings.description: STAIR: Per-Problem Discrete Structure in Test-Time Compute Scaling for LLM Reasoning — NeurIPS 2025 submission

top_findings.name: Multi-Agent-LLMs/lm-evaluation-harness
top_findings.description: Fork from EleutherAI’s lm‑evaluation‑harness with added multi‑agent and single‑agent test‑time inference scaling pipelines for LLM evaluation with compute-estimation for the paper "Multi-Agent Reasoning Improves Compute Efficiency: Pareto-Optimal Scaling of Test-Time"

top_findings.name: TsingFengIceberg/Harness-study
top_findings.description: Horizontal study of AI Agent Harness architectures — comparing DeerFlow, OpenClaw, Claw-Code, Hermes Agent, and Claude Code internals. 横向学习 AI Agent Harness 架构设计 — 对比 DeerFlow、OpenClaw、Claw-Code、Hermes Agent 及 Claude Code 实现原理。

top_findings.name: leeIITM/layered_diffusion
top_findings.description: This project implements layered image generation using pretrained diffusion models like Stable Diffusion 1.5. It enables staged control of background, midground, and foreground using ControlNet, inpainting, and semantic masks—allowing structured, interpretable image synthesis with minimal compute.

top_findings.name: Tingyi0819/DL2026_Team2_Sketch-to-Real-Generation
top_findings.description: Controllable Image Generation  Using ControlNet or Stable Diffusion, implement a “Sketch-to-Real” system where users draw rough outlines and the model generates a high-fidelity images.

top_findings.name: kai9987kai/scribble-diffusion
top_findings.description: Scribble Diffusion is a small Next.js app powered by Replicate ControlNet. Draw or edit a scribble, describe the image you want, then run generation with optional experiment controls for variations, guidance, seeds, and ControlNet structure modes.

top_findings.name: AI688-Final-Project-Spring-2026/Sketch2Style-ControlNet-Fashion
top_findings.description: Sketch2Style: A controllable AI fashion design system using Stable Diffusion v1.5 with ControlNet for sketch-conditioned fashion image generation on Fashion-MNIST dataset.

top_findings.name: PotatoJnny/Scaling-Law-Guided-search
top_findings.description: Scaling-Law Guided (SLG) Search: Optimizing LLM test-time compute via tail estimation and dynamic budget allocation.

top_findings.name: neosun100/Step-Audio-R1.1
top_findings.description: Step-Audio-R1.1: The First Audio Language Model with Test-Time Compute Scaling. All-in-One Docker with vLLM + Web UI + API.

top_findings.name: tammychurchly25/ClaudeCode-Source-Analysis
top_findings.description: Analyze Claude Code source leaks, map the architecture, and document its TypeScript, Bun, agent, and security systems.

top_findings.name: Angeliquetreated862/claude-code-src
top_findings.description: Explore a public Claude Code source snapshot for security research, supply-chain analysis, and CLI architecture review

top_findings.name: ptolemaic-programmemusic151/claude-code-book
top_findings.description: Explore Claude Code CLI architecture and implementation with a clear technical guide from startup flow to advanced query engine design

top_findings.name: DarkWaterReflection/comfyui-controlnet-scene-control
top_findings.description: ControlNet OpenPose workflow in ComfyUI — same pose, four styles.  Proves creative control over AI image generation using pose extraction,  prompt conditioning, and scene control. Runs on GTX 1650 4GB.
